news-global-econ.title: Blackburn: 'Let's Be Sure' Other Members of the Axis of Evil Don't Prop Iran Up
news-global-econ.description:
Friday on FNC's "Hannity," Sen. Marsha Blackburn (R-TN) expressed her support for President Donald Trump's actions against Iran.

news-global-econ.title: Detransitioner details consequences of 'gender-affirming care' | Fox News Video
news-global-econ.description: Claire Abernathy shares her story of enduring hormone replacement and gender surgery at age 14, detailing the long-term physical and emotional consequences.

news-global-econ.title: Castro indictment fuels speculation Trump may be reviving Maduro playbook against Cuba
news-global-econ.description: The Trump administration's indictment of Raúl Castro fuels comparisons to the Venezuela pressure campaign involving sanctions and the military.

news-global-soc.title: EXCLUSIVE: Air Force debuts historic 8-ship bomber-fighter formation over Miami Beach
news-global-soc.description: A historic Memorial Day weekend flyover dubbed the "Arsenal of Freedom" featured B-52, B-1B, F-22 and F-35 aircraft soaring over Miami Beach crowds.

news-global-soc.title: Lindsay Lohan, Brooks Nader and Halsey heat up red carpets in sky-high slits and sheer gowns
news-global-soc.description: Hollywood's biggest stars stepped out in revealing black dresses this week, with sheer gowns and high slits dominating red carpets from Cannes to Milan.

news-global-soc.title: Congo team must isolate to enter United States for World Cup amid Ebola outbreak
news-global-soc.description: Andrew Giuliani said Congo's soccer team must isolate for 21 days before entering the U.S. for the World Cup amid the country's Ebola outbreak.

news-global-soc.title: France Bans Israeli National Security Chief over Treatment of Gaza Flotilla Activists
news-global-soc.description:
France on Saturday banned Israel's far-right national security minister, Itamar Ben-Gvir, citing his "unspeakable" behavior targeting activists from a flotilla to Gaza who were detained by his police force.

news-global-soc.title: DOJ, Treasury investigate nonprofits and leaders allegedly coordinating with Cuba in influence campaign
news-global-soc.description: Murder charges against Raúl Castro trigger a rapid activist response that federal officials investigate for ties to an alleged Cuban influence operation.
